---
title: "04b_model_clinical"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 1. Load packages and data
#--------------------------------------------------

library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(caret)
library(glmnet)
library(ranger)
library(pROC)

clinical_master <- read_rds(here("data", "interim", "clinical_master.rds"))

dir.create(here("outputs"), showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(here("outputs", "tables"), showWarnings = FALSE)
dir.create(here("outputs", "model_objects"), showWarnings = FALSE)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 2. Select benchmark variables
#--------------------------------------------------

clinical_model <- clinical_master %>%
  select(
    case_submitter_id,
    survival_500,
    age_at_index,
    gender,
    primary_diagnosis,
    architectural_pattern,
    necrosis_percent,
    sarcomatoid_percent,
    spindle_cell_percent,
    epithelioid_percent,
    smoking_status,
    asbestos_exposure_type
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(survival_500))
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 3. Basic cleaning
#--------------------------------------------------

clinical_model <- clinical_model %>%
  mutate(
    across(
      c(gender, primary_diagnosis, architectural_pattern, smoking_status, asbestos_exposure_type),
      ~ replace_na(as.character(.x), "Unknown")
    ),
    necrosis_percent = as.numeric(necrosis_percent),
    sarcomatoid_percent = as.numeric(sarcomatoid_percent),
    spindle_cell_percent = as.numeric(spindle_cell_percent),
    epithelioid_percent = as.numeric(epithelioid_percent),
    age_at_index = as.numeric(age_at_index)
  )

# median imputation for numeric variables
clinical_model <- clinical_model %>%
  mutate(
    age_at_index = ifelse(is.na(age_at_index), median(age_at_index, na.rm = TRUE), age_at_index),
    necrosis_percent = ifelse(is.na(necrosis_percent), median(necrosis_percent, na.rm = TRUE), necrosis_percent),
    sarcomatoid_percent = ifelse(is.na(sarcomatoid_percent), median(sarcomatoid_percent, na.rm = TRUE), sarcomatoid_percent),
    spindle_cell_percent = ifelse(is.na(spindle_cell_percent), median(spindle_cell_percent, na.rm = TRUE), spindle_cell_percent),
    epithelioid_percent = ifelse(is.na(epithelioid_percent), median(epithelioid_percent, na.rm = TRUE), epithelioid_percent)
  )
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 4. Drop categorical variables with only one level
#--------------------------------------------------

cat_cols <- c(
  "gender",
  "primary_diagnosis",
  "architectural_pattern",
  "smoking_status",
  "asbestos_exposure_type"
)

# convert to factors
clinical_model <- clinical_model %>%
  mutate(across(all_of(cat_cols), as.factor))

# count distinct non-missing levels
cat_levels <- sapply(clinical_model[cat_cols], function(x) nlevels(droplevels(x)))
cat_levels

# keep only categorical variables with 2+ levels
cat_cols_keep <- names(cat_levels[cat_levels >= 2])

cat_cols_keep
```


```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 5. Create design matrix
#--------------------------------------------------

num_cols <- c(
  "age_at_index",
  "necrosis_percent",
  "sarcomatoid_percent",
  "spindle_cell_percent",
  "epithelioid_percent"
)

clinical_predictors <- clinical_model %>%
  select(all_of(c(num_cols, cat_cols_keep)))

dummies <- dummyVars(~ ., data = clinical_predictors, fullRank = TRUE)

x_clinical <- predict(dummies, newdata = clinical_predictors) %>%
  as.data.frame()

x_clinical <- x_clinical %>%
  select(where(~ !all(is.na(.)))) %>%
  select(where(~ var(.x, na.rm = TRUE) > 0)) %>%
  mutate(across(
    everything(),
    ~ ifelse(is.na(.x), median(.x, na.rm = TRUE), .x)
  ))

y_clinical <- factor(clinical_model$survival_500, levels = c("No", "Yes"))

dim(x_clinical)
table(y_clinical)
colSums(is.na(x_clinical))
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 6. Train control
#--------------------------------------------------

set.seed(123)

ctrl <- trainControl(
  method = "repeatedcv",
  number = 5,
  repeats = 5,
  classProbs = TRUE,
  summaryFunction = twoClassSummary,
  savePredictions = "final"
)
```

```{r}
#-------------------------------------------------
# 7. Elastic net model
#--------------------------------------------------

enet_grid <- expand.grid(
  alpha = c(0, 0.25, 0.5, 0.75, 1),
  lambda = 10^seq(-3, 1, length.out = 20)
)

set.seed(123)

model_enet_clinical <- train(
  x = x_clinical,
  y = y_clinical,
  method = "glmnet",
  metric = "ROC",
  trControl = ctrl,
  tuneGrid = enet_grid
)

print(model_enet_clinical$bestTune)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 8. Random forest model
#--------------------------------------------------

rf_grid <- expand.grid(
  mtry = c(2, 4, 6, 8),
  splitrule = "gini",
  min.node.size = c(1, 5, 10)
)

set.seed(123)

model_rf_clinical <- train(
  x = x_clinical,
  y = y_clinical,
  method = "ranger",
  metric = "ROC",
  trControl = ctrl,
  tuneGrid = rf_grid,
  num.trees = 500,
  importance = "impurity"
)

print(model_rf_clinical$bestTune)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 9. Summaries
#--------------------------------------------------

clinical_model_summary <- bind_rows(
  model_enet_clinical$results %>%
    mutate(model = "ElasticNet") %>%
    filter(
      alpha == model_enet_clinical$bestTune$alpha,
      lambda == model_enet_clinical$bestTune$lambda
    ),
  model_rf_clinical$results %>%
    mutate(model = "RandomForest") %>%
    filter(
      mtry == model_rf_clinical$bestTune$mtry,
      splitrule == model_rf_clinical$bestTune$splitrule,
      min.node.size == model_rf_clinical$bestTune$min.node.size
    )
)

print(clinical_model_summary)

write_csv(
  clinical_model_summary,
  here("outputs", "tables", "clinical_model_summary.csv")
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 10. AUC from saved CV predictions
#--------------------------------------------------

enet_pred <- model_enet_clinical$pred %>%
  filter(
    alpha == model_enet_clinical$bestTune$alpha,
    lambda == model_enet_clinical$bestTune$lambda
  )

rf_pred <- model_rf_clinical$pred %>%
  filter(
    mtry == model_rf_clinical$bestTune$mtry,
    splitrule == model_rf_clinical$bestTune$splitrule,
    min.node.size == model_rf_clinical$bestTune$min.node.size
  )

auc_enet <- roc(
  response = enet_pred$obs,
  predictor = enet_pred$Yes,
  levels = c("No", "Yes"),
  direction = "<"
)$auc

auc_rf <- roc(
  response = rf_pred$obs,
  predictor = rf_pred$Yes,
  levels = c("No", "Yes"),
  direction = "<"
)$auc

clinical_auc_summary <- tibble(
  model = c("ElasticNet", "RandomForest"),
  auc = c(as.numeric(auc_enet), as.numeric(auc_rf))
)

print(clinical_auc_summary)

write_csv(
  clinical_auc_summary,
  here("outputs", "tables", "clinical_auc_summary.csv")
)
```

```{r}
#--------------------------------------------------
# 11. Variable importance
#--------------------------------------------------

enet_varimp <- varImp(model_enet_clinical)$importance %>%
  rownames_to_column("feature") %>%
  arrange(desc(Overall))

rf_varimp <- varImp(model_rf_clinical)$importance %>%
  rownames_to_column("feature") %>%
  arrange(desc(Overall))

write_csv(
  enet_varimp,
  here("outputs", "tables", "clinical_enet_varimp.csv")
)

write_csv(
  rf_varimp,
  here("outputs", "tables", "clinical_rf_varimp.csv")
)
```
